summary: Iteration 64 bug fix testing complete. The new exclude-from-week mechanism works correctly: expenses/invoices can be hidden from weekly reports without being deleted from the global list. All 10 backend tests pass. Frontend UI flow verified: checkbox selection, 'Retirer de cette semaine' button, confirmation dialog, toast notification, and report refresh all work as expected.

issues: Console warnings about HTML nesting: '<tr> cannot be child of <span>' and '<span> cannot be child of <tbody>'. These are React hydration warnings but don't affect functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: Backend expenses.py lines 649-679: New exclude-from-week-bulk and include-in-week-bulk endpoints correctly use $addToSet and $pull for idempotent operations
Backend invoices.py lines 618-645: Same endpoints implemented for invoices
Backend server.py lines 4787-4855: Weekly report correctly filters using not_excluded_filter with $nin operator
Frontend HebdoReport.jsx lines 119-136: removeFromWeek() correctly calls exclude-from-week-bulk with week_start parameter and shows proper confirmation message
seed_data_creation: Created test expense TEST_ITER64_UI_Expense_for_removal (12345 F) for UI testing. Cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 64 fixed the bug where removing purchases from weekly reports was deleting them from the global list. New mechanism: excluded_from_weeks[] array. Key endpoints: POST /api/expenses/exclude-from-week-bulk (adds week to array), POST /api/expenses/include-in-week-bulk (removes week from array). Same for invoices. GET /api/reports/weekly now filters items where excluded_from_weeks contains the week_start. Frontend 'Retirer de cette semaine' button in Point Hebdomadaire uses the new exclude endpoint.

backend: POST /api/expenses/exclude-from-week-bulk - adds week_start to excluded_from_weeks[] (idempotent via $addToSet) - VERIFIED
POST /api/expenses/include-in-week-bulk - removes week_start from excluded_from_weeks[] (via $pull) - VERIFIED
GET /api/reports/weekly - filters out items with excluded_from_weeks containing week_start - VERIFIED
GET /api/expenses - still returns excluded items (not deleted) - VERIFIED
Bulk operations work for multiple items - VERIFIED
Empty week_start rejected with 400 error - VERIFIED
frontend: Admin login and navigate to Hebdo tab - VERIFIED
Expense appears in weekly report when status=completed - VERIFIED
Expand day row to see expense details with checkbox - VERIFIED
Select expense checkbox shows action bar with 'Retirer de cette semaine' button - VERIFIED
Confirmation dialog shows correct message about item remaining in global list - VERIFIED
Toast notification '1 element(s) retire(s) de la semaine' appears - VERIFIED
Weekly report refreshes and expense disappears from report - VERIFIED
Expense still visible in 'Achats terminés' (global list) - VERIFIED

test_scenarios_executed: Frontend: E2E flow - create expense, exclude from week, verify in global list - SUCCESS

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: la suppression des achats des points hebdomadaires ne fonctionne pas. NB : cette suppression ne doit pas entrainer la disparition des achats de la liste des achats
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Old endpoint /api/expenses/unassign-week-bulk did $unset on 'assigned_week', but expense was re-included in weekly report because its created_at/completed_at naturally fell within the week
bug_fix_verification.fix_implemented: New mechanism using excluded_from_weeks[] array. Exclude adds week_start to array, include removes it. Weekly report filters out items where excluded_from_weeks contains the week_start.
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: FIXED - Expense removed from weekly report but still exists in global list
